The zoo is home to a diverse collection of animals, including tigers, lions, elephants, monkeys, birds, and reptiles. The zoo also has a botanical garden with a variety of plant species.ExploreDhaka's toptourismattractions, from historic sites and lively markets to tranquil parks. Dive intoDhaka tourism!ExploreDhakaholidays and discover the best time and places to visit.Is Dhaka a good place to visit?Dhaka isnot the best place to visitif you want to see beautiful Asian landmarks and indulge in luxury (I’m sorry, Dhaka). If you’re up for an adventure unlike any other, however, Dhaka might just be the perfect place to go. So, without further ado, here are the best places to visit in Dhaka, Bangladesh’s crazy capital.When is the best time to visit Dhaka Bangladesh?With a rich cultural history reflected in its tourist sites and the beautiful Ganges Delta, visiting Dhaka Bangladesh is extremely enjoyable. The capital city has a tropical savannah climate, and thus, the best time to explore all the places to visit in Dhaka would bebetween October and March.What to do in Dhaka city?Visit the many mosques, temples and museums for a taste of Bengali culture and history. Where should I stay inDhakaCity? What are the best places to eat inDhakaCity?Is Dhaka a quiet place?Dhaka is not a quiet, retiring place. The city, bursting with nearly 17 million people (most of whom often seem to be stuck in the same traffic jam as you), is a gloriously noisy and chaotic place, bubbling with energy.
